steps.title: Find the prism width
steps.content:
The base area is $63t$, and the length is $\frac{21}{4}$. Divide area by length:
$$63t\div\frac{21}{4}=63t\cdot\frac{4}{21}=12t$$

steps.title: Find the face areas
steps.content:
The three different face areas are the base, front face, and side face:
$$63t$$
$$\frac{21}{4}\cdot4=21$$
$$12t\cdot4=48t$$

steps.title: Double the face sum
steps.content:
A rectangular prism has two of each face, so:
$$2(63t+21+48t)=2(111t+21)$$
$$2(111t+21)=222t+42$$
The answer is B.
